Order Custom Backdrop Banners for Professional Event Photography

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Make the most of your next event with an eye-catching vinyl backdrop banner. From trade shows and in-store displays to family reunions and parades, we can help you improve your visibility and make an unforgettable first impression with our professionally designed custom backdrop banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a backdrop banner that you're proud to display. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the backdrop banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made backdrop banner. If something doesn't meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority.

We offer a wide selection of custom backdrop banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your backdrop banner is delivered when you need it. Get started on your order today. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our in-house customer support team.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Looking for something more specific? Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Backdrop Banner Material for Indoor & Outdoor Event Use

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your backdrop banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All backdrop banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of backdrop banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your backdrop banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Backdrop Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl backdrop banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Backdrop Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl backdrop banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high-end look.

18 oz Vinyl Backdrop Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl backdrop banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality.

Mesh Backdrop Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh backdrop banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions.

Fabric Backdrop Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Backdrop Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Professional Backdrop Banner Display

Backdrop Banner Finishing Options

Hems & Grommets Reinforced Hems Reinforced Corners Pole Pockets
These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2–4 feet. A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners. A sleeve added to allow for a dowel or pole to run through for support.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the backdrop banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all backdrop banners to increase durability.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for backdrop banners.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the backdrop banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the backdrop banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your backdrop banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the backdrop banner.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the backdrop banner.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Backdrop Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided backdrop banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in backdrop banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Backdrop Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy for most custom orders.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you're not in a rush, you can save money by choosing our 5-Day Saver option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Backdrop Banner Orders

All backdrop banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Large Format Backdrop Banner Delivery

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the backdrop banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International Shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods:

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping, please add additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days depending on destination.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Event & Trade Show Uses for Backdrop Banners

We print thousands of backdrop banners each year. If you need inspiration for designing your backdrop banner, explore some popular ways below for how our customers use backdrop banners.

Business and Retail

  • Grand openings
  • Storefront advertising
  • Seasonal sales

Events and Trade Shows

  • Trade show booth backdrops
  • Sponsor recognition banners
  • Step-and-repeat photo backdrops

Outdoor and Public Use

  • Festivals and fairs
  • Street-pole banners
  • Community events

Construction and Real Estate

  • Construction site branding
  • "Coming Soon" project announcements
  • Real estate "For Sale" banners

Education and Schools

  • Graduation banners
  • Sports team support banners
  • School event promotions

Sports and Athletics

  • Tournament announcements
  • Game day signage
  • Stadium or field advertising

Nonprofit, Government, and Community

  • Donation drives
  • Awareness campaigns
  • Political campaign signage

Personal and Celebratory

  • Birthday banners
  • Wedding welcome signage
  • Anniversary celebrations

Hospitality and Food Service

  • Restaurant grand opening banners
  • Seasonal menu launch
  • Daily specials or promotions
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Custom Backdrop Banner Printing

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Your Custom Backdrop Banner Today

Ensure your special event strikes a professional tone with a custom vinyl backdrop banner. Custom backdrops, also known as step and repeat banners, are commonly used as backgrounds for various special events. These events include red carpet debuts, press conferences, photo shoots, sports events, weddings, proms, and more. Use an event backdrop banner to set the perfect tone.

Create memorable moments, eliminate background distractions and delight your event sponsors. Every photo and video clip of your event will have your chosen logo splashed across the background. That's why backdrop designs are powerful as branding tools or as fun-having hotspots for events of all kinds.

Banner backdrop printing is done digitally. The banner printing takes place on lightweight 13 oz vinyl or 18 oz vinyl for lasting durability. Common backdrop banner sizes are 8' x 8' and 8' x 10' for group photos and conferences and trade shows. Submit one or more logos from event hosts or sponsors which tessellate across the backdrop. We also offer a backdrop banner stand product that comes as a complete set which is perfect for events.

Customize a template in our online design tool, upload your own high resolution designs or work with our designers to create the perfect look for your special event.

Custom backdrop banners are perfect for any type of event where there will be loads of pictures taken for social media pages.

These banners can be customized with your brand's designs. Choose between three banner material options: heavy-duty 18 oz vinyl, 13 oz premium matte finish, or 13 oz premium gloss finish. The 18 oz option is strong and durable. It is great for displaying outdoor banners. It can last for many days or even weeks in a row.

The 13 oz choices are very durable. They are preferred for indoor or outdoor display in non-weather-sensitive areas. The matte option is usually hung indoors while the glossy option is generally displayed as an outdoor banner.

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color backdrop banners take your event to the next level. At banners.com, we offer all that and more, like quick delivery and outdoor durability. Request a quote and start your design, today.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What are backdrop banners?

Backdrop banners are large-format printed banners used as a photo background at events (often for red carpet or step-and-repeat style photos). They can be used alone or with a backdrop banner stand for display.

What materials are available for custom backdrop banners?

Backdrop banners are available in: 13 oz premium matte vinyl, 13 oz premium gloss vinyl, 18 oz extra heavy-duty matte vinyl, 8 oz PVC polyester mesh, and polyester fabric.

What are the most common backdrop banner sizes?

Two popular sizes are 8' × 8' (great for small group photos) and 8' × 20' (ideal for larger, red-carpet-style photo lines).

What sizes can I order for a custom backdrop banner?

Backdrop banners can be ordered from 1' × 1' up to 8' × 50'.

Do backdrop banners come with pole pockets?

Pole pockets are available as an add-on. Select pole pockets in the finishing options during checkout.

What pole pocket sizes are available, and what pole fits each?

2" pole pocket: fits ~3/4" diameter pole
3" pole pocket: fits ~1 1/4" diameter pole
4" pole pocket: fits ~1 1/2" diameter pole

What events are backdrop banners used for?

Common uses include trade shows, conferences, corporate events, grand openings, weddings, birthday parties, and red carpet/photo booth setups.

What other banner types do you offer besides backdrop banners?

We offer a range of custom banners and flags, including mesh banners, fabric banners, canvas banners, pole banners, step-and-repeat, and various specialty banners and custom flags.

How do I hang or install a backdrop banner?

Use all grommets to distribute tension evenly, and consider ball bungees for secure mounting and reduced stress on the banner.

How should I store a backdrop banner when it's not in use?

Roll it (don't fold it) with the printed side facing out, and store it in the original box/tube away from extreme heat and direct sunlight.

How do I remove wrinkles or creases from a backdrop banner?

Unroll it and let it relax; you can also place it in sunlight for a few hours or use a clothing steamer to smooth wrinkles. Watch our video for more information.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
